# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?
Briefly describe the changes made.

Example:
- Added login validation
- Fixed navbar styling issue
- Improved API response handling

---

## Why was this change needed?
Explain the reason for the change or the problem being solved.

---

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Code cleanup/refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

---

## Testing
Describe how you tested the changes.

Example:
- Ran the app locally
- Tested login/signup flow
- Checked responsive layout on mobile

---

## Screenshots (Optional)
Add screenshots or GIFs if the UI changed.

---

## Notes
Any extra information, future improvements, or things reviewers should know.
